TheChickstarter helps entrepreneurs turn ideas into funded, manufactured, and delivered products. From crowdfunding strategy to global fulfillment, we guide brands through every step of the launch journey.

Launch Bold Ideas. Fund Big Dreams.

About

Andrea Horblitt

CEO (Star Lab)

​

leading product developer, celebrity broker, brand expert, tech entrepreneur, and Co-CEO and Chairman of Star Lab Holdings—a Web3 platform built to engage celebrity fanbases and turn them into active participants in the launch and growth of celebrity-led consumer brands and businesses.

​

She is the go-to partner for celebrities when they want to turn influence into real businesses, known for structuring deals, developing products, financing ventures, and bringing brands to market that actually scale.

​

Mentored by advertising legend George Lois—who also mentored Tommy Hilfiger and Ralph Lauren and is often cited as the inspiration for Don Draper in Mad Men—she pioneered one of the earliest celebrity-driven viral product campaigns with her brand Suckitz.

​

Andrea is also the original inventor of the Removable Reusable Wallet, holding the original U.S. provisional patent (No. 60/789,557), a concept that evolved into the now-ubiquitous sticker wallet used globally and became one of the most widely adopted smartphone accessories of the modern era.

​

A seasoned brand expert with deep experience in trademarks and patents, Andrea has actively protected and defended her intellectual property, including legal action involving her Chickstarter trademark against Lori Greiner.

​

Her work spans product development, technology, manufacturing, marketing, and venture strategy across beauty, food and beverage, wellness, fashion, and consumer products.

​

Her goal is simple: to bring the coolest, most culturally relevant products to market, elevate ideas to their highest potential, and build the brands and businesses people actually want to be part of.

​

Andrea actively partners with founders, creators, and entrepreneurs—inviting submissions of product or business ideas at any stage to develop, finance, and scale together
